results.evidence: detectProjectFromCwd() in template-creator.ts:404-430 matches cwd against childRepos[].path. Tests: detect-project-from-cwd.test.ts:26-29, metadata-project-injection.test.ts:38-62
detectProjectFromCwd returns umbrellaConfig.projectName when cwd at umbrella root (template-creator.ts:429). Tests: detect-project-from-cwd.test.ts:37-39, metadata-project-injection.test.ts:65-87
detectProjectFromCwd returns undefined when umbrella.enabled is false (template-creator.ts:409). Tests: detect-project-from-cwd.test.ts:42-50, metadata-project-injection.test.ts:90-110
detectProjectFromCwd iterates all childRepos without filtering by disabled flag. Tests: detect-project-from-cwd.test.ts:53-56, metadata-project-injection.test.ts:127-149
resolveSyncTarget('specweave', config) returns source='child-repo-name' with per-repo targets. Tests: sync-resolver-integration.test.ts:56-62

RepoStructureManager.promptStructure called with pre-selected 'github-parent' when umbrella enabled, getArchitecturePrompt NOT called. Tests: wizard-umbrella-skip.test.ts:114-139, github-multi-repo-umbrella.test.ts:80-99
getArchitecturePrompt IS called when umbrella.enabled is false. Tests: wizard-umbrella-skip.test.ts:142-164

promptGitHubSetupType falls back gracefully when promptStructure throws HTTP 403 error. Tests: github-multi-repo-umbrella.test.ts:102-109. github-provider.ts now propagates actual HTTP status (not hardcoded 404) for better error diagnostics.
promptGitHubSetupType returns detected child repos as profiles array with correct ids. Tests: github-multi-repo-umbrella.test.ts:112-131

formatUsId(1, 'internal', 'SPE') returns 'US-SPE-001'. parseUsId handles prefix via regex /^US-(?:([A-Za-z]{2,6})-)?/. Tests: us-id-generator-prefix.test.ts:18-24,64-67, spec-parser-prefix.test.ts:32-53
formatUsId(1, 'internal', undefined) returns 'US-001' (no prefix). Tests: us-id-generator-prefix.test.ts:70-73
getNextUsId finds max number across ALL existing IDs then generates next sequential. Tests: us-id-generator-prefix.test.ts:82-106
extractPrefix('US-SPE-001') returns 'SPE', routeByPrefix matches childRepos[].prefix. Tests: story-router-prefix.test.ts:20-33
extractPrefix('US-001') returns null, Phase 3 global fallback handles it. Old parseUsId format still works. Tests: story-router-prefix.test.ts:37-44, us-id-generator-prefix.test.ts:128-135
three-file-validator.ts:368-375 emits METADATA_MISSING_PROJECT WARNING when umbrella.enabled && childRepos.length > 1 && !metadata.project. Tests: project-validation.test.ts:65-88
three-file-validator.ts:353 returns early when !config.umbrella?.enabled — no warning for single-repo. Tests: project-validation.test.ts:91-105
three-file-validator.ts:378-389 emits METADATA_UNKNOWN_PROJECT WARNING when project doesn't match any childRepo.id or umbrella.projectName. Tests: project-validation.test.ts:120-143

testResults.preExistingFailureNote: All 57 failing test files are pre-existing integration/E2E/plugin-validation failures unrelated to 0617 changes
